interpretation.partial_kg_hurts: Both ablations have lower r than C_LLM (0.971), confirming that partial KG evidence disrupts grading calibration
interpretation.taxonomy_vs_concepts: taxonomy_only r=0.852 >> concepts_only r=0.444 — SOLO/Bloom taxonomy provides stronger ranking signal
interpretation.ceiling_effect: taxonomy_only caps at 3.0 maximum score — SOLO level alone cannot distinguish 3-5 range
interpretation.coverage_effect: concepts_only fails for KG-sparse topics (Big-O, recursion, DP) with 0 matched concepts
interpretation.synergy_confirmed: Only full KG integration (C5_fix) improves over C_LLM — synergy between taxonomy and concept coverage is essential
